'''Fighter Wing Zero-Zero''' was a [[Confederate Navy/Legends|Confederate Navy]] [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] [[Squadron/Legends|squadron]]. It fought at the [[Battle of Nadiem]] where its access to the [[Planet/Legends|planet's]] surface was blocked by [[Saesee Tiin/Legends|Saesee Tiin's]] orbital [[Blockade/Legends|blockade]].

{{Military-stub}}
